text: Take your time, watch those marshmallows, ease on them, I won't bite, unless you ask me to.
Making my way downtown, walking fast, places pass and I'm homebound.
And I need you, and I miss you, and now I wonder, if I could fall into the sky.
Do you think time would pass me by?
Cause you know I'd walk a thousand miles if I could just see you tonight.
